quick_skim.title: Operator Learning for PDE Backstepping Control of Parabolic Equations on Time-Varying Domains
quick_skim.abstract: This paper develops a learning-based boundary control framework for stabilizing a parabolic equation defined on time-varying spatial domain. Although the partial differential equation (PDE) backstepping method provides a systematic theoretical framework for such moving-boundary systems, its real-time implementation is hindered by the need to repeatedly solve time-varying kernel PDEs on evolving domains. To overcome this limitation, we first formulate the time-varying backstepping design as an operator that maps the moving-boundary trajectory to the corresponding backstepping kernel. By mapping the time-varying domain of the backstepping kernel equation onto a fixed reference domain, we establish the continuous dependence of the kernel on the moving-boundary trajectory, which provides the theoretical basis for approximating the backstepping design operator by a neural operator. Based on the approximate kernel operator, we construct the corresponding boundary feedback controller to stabilize the system. It is shown that the closed-loop system admits an exponential decay estimate on any prescribed finite time interval. For numerical implementation, DeepONet is employed to learn the time-varying kernel operator from offline-generated numerical kernel solutions and is subsequently deployed online to generate the required time-varying kernels without repeatedly solving the kernel PDE. Numerical benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed neural-operator-based implementation bypasses repeated online solution of the time-varying kernel PDE, achieves a significant acceleration of close to three orders of magnitude compared with conventional numerical kernel solvers, and thus enables real-time stabilization of the system on time-varying spatial domain.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: operator learning for PDE backstepping control on time-varying domains, related to neural operators for transport
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 算子学习用于时变域上的PDE反步控制，与神经算子应用于传输问题相关
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 算子学习用于时变域上的PDE反步控制，与神经算子应用于传输问题相关
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 算子学习用于时变域上的PDE反步控制，与神经算子应用于传输问题相关
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Uses operator learning to approximate time-varying backstepping kernels for parabolic PDEs, enabling real-time control; method relevant to physics-informed neural operators for atmospheric transport.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文针对时变域上抛物型PDE的边界控制问题，将反步设计转化为一个算子学习任务，通过学习映射来避免实时求解时变核PDE。所提出的算子学习方法具有通用性，可推广至大气传输中的对流扩散方程，为物理信息神经算子提供控制理论视角。尽管具体应用不同，其核心思想与需求9（物理信息神经算子用于大气传输）高度契合。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文针对时变域上抛物型PDE的边界控制问题，将反步设计转化为一个算子学习任务，通过学习映射来避免实时求解时变核PDE。所提出的算子学习方法具有通用性，可推广至大气传输中的对流扩散方程，为物理信息神经算子提供控制理论视角。尽管具体应用不同，其核心思想与需求9（物理信息神经算子用于大气传输）高度契合。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: physics informed neural operators for atmospheric transport advection diffusion and mass conservation
